partial_progress.details: Phase 1 complete. Phase 2 partial: TimelineQuotAlgebra.lean created successfully with AddCommGroup transfer. TimelineQuotFMCS blocked on proving timelineQuot_lt_implies_canonicalR due to quotient representative complexity.

completion_data.completion_summary: Created TimelineQuotAlgebra.lean providing AddCommGroup and IsOrderedAddMonoid instances for TimelineQuot via Cantor isomorphism transfer from Rat. Phase 2 TimelineQuotFMCS blocked on CanonicalR proof through quotient representatives.
